embed.title: !mute
embed.description: Silence alerts for a specific gym, pokemon, area, pokestop, station, or all alerts for a time-bounded window.

fields.name: Mute by scope
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}mute everything [duration:1h]` — silence ALL alerts
`{{prefix}}mute gym <name-or-id> [duration:1h]` — one gym
`{{prefix}}mute pokemon <name-or-id> [duration:1h]` — one pokemon species
`{{prefix}}mute pikachu [duration:1h]` — shorthand (pokemon assumed)
`{{prefix}}mute area <name> [duration:1h]` — one area
`{{prefix}}mute pokestop <id> [duration:1h]` — one pokestop (hex ID)
`{{prefix}}mute station <id> [duration:1h]` — one max-battle station

Duration defaults to 1h if omitted. Accepts `30m`, `2h`, `7d`, etc.

fields.name: Per-type aliases
fields.value:
Most tracking commands accept `mute` as a first argument and forward to `!mute` with the type filled in:
`{{prefix}}raid mute gym "Hilltop Gym" duration:2h`
`{{prefix}}gym mute gym "Hilltop Gym"`
`{{prefix}}invasion mute pokestop <id>`

These are convenience aliases — they behave identically to the full `{{prefix}}mute` form.

fields.name: Unmute
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}unmute gym <name-or-id>` — remove a gym mute early
`{{prefix}}unmute pokemon pikachu`
`{{prefix}}unmute area <name>`
`{{prefix}}unmute everything` — clear ALL active mutes
`{{prefix}}unmute all` — same as above

fields.name: View active mutes
fields.value: `{{prefix}}tracked` — lists your active mutes alongside your tracking rules, with time remaining

fields.name: Related
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help start` / `{{prefix}}help stop` — pause or resume all alerts
`{{prefix}}help tracked` — review all tracking and mutes
